_meta.live_application_block: keyed to TEAM IDENTITY (club teams != WC teams); needs each WC team's INTERNATIONAL foul history to compute tendency. Corpus is club-only (no internationals). Same international-sparsity wall as the referee edge, milder (nat teams ~10-30 competitive matches/cycle) but blocked without an intl foul-stat source (FBref had it, was 403).
_meta.crowd_note: crowd is NOT lazy on fouls (moved toward truth 5/7 resolved rows) — edge is mainly vs our own flat-0.5 SHADOW (we lose RBP to crowd now), not a large edge vs the crowd.
features: tend_diff (team prior foul mean - opp prior foul mean, shrunk)
_meta.target: team committed strictly MORE fouls than opponent (tie->0)
_meta.note: coefs on STANDARDIZED features. DO NOT WIRE — investigation artifact pending intl foul source.
